json-schema-validator.generatedSchemaDescription: A JSON Schema preview generated from the sample JSON.
json-schema-validator.generatedSchemaUnavailableDescription: Fix the sample JSON to generate a schema preview.
json-schema-validator.invalidDescription: The sample JSON does not satisfy the schema.
json-schema-validator.invalidSchema: Provided JSON Schema is not valid.
json-schema-validator.optionsDescription: Generate a stricter JSON Schema from the sample JSON and validate it immediately.
json-schema-validator.resultDescription: The sample JSON is validated against the active schema.
json-schema-validator.sampleDescription: Paste a sample JSON document to generate a schema from it.
json-schema-validator.schemaDescription: Edit the schema below or use the generated preview, then validate the sample JSON against it.
json-schema-validator.schemaPlaceholder: Leave empty to use the generated schema...
json-schema-validator.strictModeDescription: Mark all observed object properties as required and disallow extra properties in generated schema.
json-schema-validator.title: JSON Schema validator
json-schema-validator.validDescription: The sample JSON matches the current schema.
json-schema-validator.validationUnavailableDescription: Fix the sample JSON to validate it.
json-schema-validator.validationUnavailableSchemaDescription: Fix the schema to validate the sample JSON.
